title: Create a new Web project session successfully
description: Verifies a user can create a new session with a valid name and Web project type and land in the workspace.

steps.description: Type "Website Redesign" into the project name input
Select "Web" from the project type list

title: Create a new Mobile project session successfully
description: Verifies a user can create a new session with a valid name and Mobile project type and land in the workspace.

steps.description: Type "Mobile App MVP" into the project name input
Select "Mobile" from the project type list

title: Validate required project name when creating a session
description: Verifies the modal shows a validation message and stays open when the project name is empty.

title: Project type selection list includes multiple options
description: Verifies the project type list offers multiple expected options to choose from.

title: Create a session using a non-default project type (Business)
description: Verifies a user can create a session using an additional project type option beyond Web/Mobile.

steps.description: Type "Go-To-Market Plan" into the project name input
Select "Business" from the project type list

title: Reject whitespace-only project name
description: Verifies the modal shows a validation error when the user enters only spaces for the project name.

steps.description: Type "   " into the project name input

title: Create a session with a long project name
description: Verifies a long but reasonable project name can still create a session and redirect to the workspace.

steps.description: Type "Enterprise Customer Onboarding Experience Improvements Phase 1" into the project name input
Select "Web" from the project type list

title: Cancel out of the New Project modal without creating a session
description: Verifies the user can close the modal and remain on the dashboard without being redirected.

title: Auto mode: send chat message and see AI response appear in chat
description: Verifies a user can send a message and see an AI response message appear in the conversation in Auto mode.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Type "Create a concise PRD outline for a task management app" into the chat input
Verify element "AI message bubble" is visible

title: Auto mode: click a document type button and see a new document tab appear
description: Verifies requesting a specific document type from the toolbar results in a generated document appearing as a new tab in the document preview.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on the "PRD" document type button in the toolbar
Verify element "AI message bubble" is visible
Verify element "PRD" tab in the document preview is visible
Click on the "PRD" tab in the document preview

title: Guided mode: toggle Guided and see guided progress bar appear
description: Verifies switching from Auto to Guided mode shows the guided progress UI.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Verify element "Generation mode toggle" is visible
Verify element "Guided progress bar" is visible
Type "Generate the project documents for an ecommerce marketplace" into the chat input
Verify element "Guided progress bar" is visible

title: Guided mode: request a specific document type and confirm it appears as a new doc tab
description: Verifies guided generation can be used with a specific document type request and results in a new document tab.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Verify element "Guided progress bar" is visible
Click on the "Tech Spec" document type button in the toolbar
Verify element "AI message bubble" is visible
Verify element "Tech Spec" tab in the document preview is visible
Click on the "Tech Spec" tab in the document preview

title: Streaming: AI response begins appearing after sending a message
description: Verifies the UI shows an in-progress/streaming AI response after sending a message (at least an AI bubble appears promptly).

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Type "Draft a one-page design doc for notifications" into the chat input
Verify element "AI message bubble" is visible
Verify element "AI response streaming indicator" is visible

title: Chat input validation: attempt to send an empty message
description: Verifies the user cannot send a blank chat message and no new user message bubble appears.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Verify element "User message bubble" is not visible

title: Document generation controls: generate two different document types and verify both tabs exist
description: Verifies users can request multiple document types and see multiple document tabs in the preview.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on the "PRD" document type button in the toolbar
Verify element "PRD" tab in the document preview is visible
Click on the "Architecture" document type button in the toolbar
Verify element "Architecture" tab in the document preview is visible
Click on the "Architecture" tab in the document preview

title: Switch between documents using tabs and see content update
description: Verifies that document tabs switch the preview to the selected document and show rendered Markdown content.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on a document tab that is not currently selected

title: Rendered Markdown shows formatting and code styling in preview
description: Verifies that the preview renders Markdown formatting (e.g., headings/bullets) and displays code blocks in a styled manner.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on a document tab that is likely to contain structured content (for example a PRD or Tech Spec tab)
Verify at least one heading-style line of text is visible in the preview (for example a line starting with a document title)

title: Enter inline edit mode and save updates to the preview
description: Verifies that editing document content in inline edit mode and saving updates the rendered Markdown preview.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Type "\n\nEDIT TEST: Saved change." into the document textarea
Verify text "EDIT TEST: Saved change." is visible

title: Enter inline edit mode and cancel restores original content
description: Verifies that canceling an inline edit discards changes and restores the original rendered Markdown.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Type "\n\nEDIT TEST: Should be discarded." into the document textarea
Verify text "EDIT TEST: Should be discarded." is not visible

title: Switching document tabs does not keep edit mode active
description: Verifies that changing documents exits editing and shows a normal rendered preview for the newly selected document.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on a different document tab

title: Ask AI button is visible on section headings and opens a request UI
description: Verifies that section headings expose an "Ask AI" action and that clicking it opens a visible request area for section-specific changes.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Scroll to a section heading within the document preview
Click the "Ask AI" button for that section

title: Toggle a task list item checkbox in the rendered Markdown preview
description: Verifies that task list checkboxes in the document preview can be toggled and show an updated checked/unchecked state.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on a document tab that contains a checklist (task list items)
Scroll to a visible task list checkbox in the preview
Verify element "task list checkbox (checked state)" is visible

title: Open an image in fullscreen lightbox from the document preview
description: Verifies that clicking an image inside the document preview opens a fullscreen lightbox overlay.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on a document tab that contains an image
Scroll to a visible image in the document preview
Verify element "Image lightbox" is not visible

title: Open version history panel from the session workspace
description: Verifies the user can open the history/diff UI from the session page and see a versions list area.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list

title: No history available message when there are no saved versions
description: Verifies the history panel shows a clear empty-state message when the document has no saved versions.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Verify text "No history available" is visible

title: Select two versions and open side-by-side diff viewer
description: Verifies selecting two versions results in a side-by-side diff view being displayed.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on version "Version 1" in the versions list
Click on version "Version 2" in the versions list

title: Diff viewer shows both left and right version panes
description: Verifies the diff viewer renders two visible panes/columns for the two selected versions.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on version "Version 1" in the versions list
Click on version "Version 2" in the versions list

title: Diff highlighting is visible when comparing two different versions
description: Verifies changes are visually highlighted in the diff view when versions differ.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on version "Version 1" in the versions list
Click on version "Version 2" in the versions list

title: Attempting to compare with only one version selected shows guidance
description: Verifies the UI prompts the user to select two versions when only one is selected.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on version "Version 1" in the versions list
Verify text "Select two versions" is visible

title: Switch back from diff view to version list using the toggle
description: Verifies the user can return to the versions list after opening the diff viewer.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on version "Version 1" in the versions list
Click on version "Version 2" in the versions list

title: Export action is not shown before a document is opened (guardrail)
description: Verifies the single-document export control is only accessible when a document preview is open.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Verify text "Select a document" is visible
Click on the first document in the documents list

title: Run verification and apply a single fix from an issue card
description: Verifies the verifier can run, show issues, reveal evidence, and apply a single fix that updates the document preview.

steps.description: Click on an existing project session in the dashboard list
Verify element "animated verification progress" is visible
Wait for element "issues list" to be visible
Expand an issue card to view evidence details
Click apply fix on the expanded issue

title: Issues are grouped/sorted by severity after verification completes
description: Verifies issues are presented with visible severity groupings/labels for critical, warning, and info after running verification.

steps.description: Click on an existing project session in the dashboard list
Wait for element "issues list" to be visible

title: Expand and collapse an issue card to view evidence details
description: Verifies evidence details can be opened for an issue and remain visible within the expanded card.

steps.description: Click on an existing project session in the dashboard list
Wait for element "issues list" to be visible
Expand an issue card to view evidence details
Click on the same issue card to collapse it

title: Apply all fixes in bulk from verifier panel
description: Verifies the bulk action applies fixes across issues and the UI reflects completion.

steps.description: Click on an existing project session in the dashboard list
Wait for element "issues list" to be visible
Verify text "All fixes applied" is visible

title: Dismiss a single issue and ensure it no longer appears in the list
description: Verifies an issue can be dismissed and is removed from the visible issues list.

steps.description: Click on an existing project session in the dashboard list
Wait for element "issues list" to be visible

title: Navigate from an issue to the affected document section
description: Verifies the issue card can deep-link the user to the related document/area in the workspace.

steps.description: Click on an existing project session in the dashboard list
Wait for element "issues list" to be visible
Click on the control to navigate to affected documents from an issue

title: Verifier requires at least two documents: show blocking message and do not run
description: Verifies starting verification with fewer than two documents shows a requirement message and does not display progress.

steps.description: Click on a project session that has fewer than 2 documents
Verify text "requires at least 2 documents" is visible
Verify element "animated verification progress" is not visible

title: Re-run verification after results are shown
description: Verifies the user can start verification again after a completed run and sees progress again.

steps.description: Click on an existing project session in the dashboard list
Wait for element "issues list" to be visible
Verify element "animated verification progress" is visible
Wait for element "issues list" to be visible

title: Generate an image and open it in fullscreen modal
description: Verifies a user can generate an image from a prompt, see it inline, and open it in a fullscreen modal.

steps.description: Click on an existing session in the dashboard list
Type "Architecture diagram of a web app with frontend, API, and database" into the prompt input
Click image to open fullscreen modal
Verify element "image fullscreen modal" is visible

title: Inline image appears as a new chat item after generation
description: Verifies that generating an image creates a visible inline image in the chat feed for the current session.

steps.description: Click on an existing session in the dashboard list
Scroll to the chat panel message list
Type "Sequence diagram showing login request, token issuance, and subsequent API call" into the prompt input

title: Fullscreen modal can be dismissed to return to the session workspace
description: Verifies that the fullscreen image modal can be closed and the user returns to the normal session view.

steps.description: Click on an existing session in the dashboard list
Type "Network topology diagram with load balancer, app servers, and database" into the prompt input
Click image to open fullscreen modal
Verify element "image fullscreen modal" is visible

title: Generate image with a very short prompt
description: Verifies the image generation workflow works with a minimal prompt and still renders an inline image.

steps.description: Click on an existing session in the dashboard list

title: Attempt to generate an image with an empty prompt
description: Verifies the UI prevents generation or shows user-visible feedback when the prompt is empty.

steps.description: Click on an existing session in the dashboard list

title: Handle image generation failure with manual reissue (no retry mechanism)
description: Verifies that when image generation fails, the user does not see an automatic retry and must manually reissue the request.

steps.description: Click on an existing session in the dashboard list
Type "Generate a diagram with intentionally complex details to increase failure likelihood" into the prompt input

title: Failure state shows no inline image rendered
description: Verifies that on a failed generation attempt, no new generated image is shown inline (user sees error or absence of image).

steps.description: Click on an existing session in the dashboard list
Type "Diagram request likely to fail: extremely large, detailed multi-page flowchart" into the prompt input
Verify element "generated image" is not visible

title: Generate multiple images sequentially in the same session
description: Verifies the user can generate more than one image in a single session and each appears inline in the chat.

steps.description: Click on an existing session in the dashboard list
Type "Component diagram for microservice A calling microservice B" into the prompt input
Type "Deployment diagram with Kubernetes cluster and ingress" into the prompt input

title: Open Session Settings panel from a session workspace
description: Verifies the settings panel can be opened from the session workspace UI.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list

title: Enable a document type and save settings
description: Verifies a disabled document type can be enabled and the change persists after saving.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Toggle a document type switch that is currently Off to On

title: Disable a document type and save settings
description: Verifies an enabled document type can be disabled and the change persists after saving.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Toggle a document type switch that is currently On to Off

title: Edit custom instructions for a document type and save
description: Verifies custom instructions can be edited for a selected document type and saved.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on a document type name in the settings list
Type "Add a short accessibility section." into the custom instructions text area

title: Reset to defaults then cancel confirmation keeps custom instructions unchanged
description: Verifies that canceling the reset confirmation leaves custom instructions unchanged.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
Click on a document type name in the settings list
Type "Do not include marketing language." into the custom instructions text area
Verify text "Are you sure" is visible
Verify text "Do not include marketing language." is visible

title: Saving without changes does not break the settings panel
description: Verifies the user can click Save with no edits and the UI remains stable with a visible success state.

steps.description: Click on the first session in the sessions list
